items.name_en: M13664 Black Multicolore (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
M13664 Black Multicolore (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami)
This key pouch from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami reissue is crafted from coated canvas. The vibrant signature print twists the House's iconic Monogram pattern with the Japanese artist's rainbow palette. It is secured with a silver zip and includes a chain with a hook to keep keys safe.
Size: 12 x 7 x 1.5 cm

items.name_en: M13922 Black & Color! LV x TM Zipper Bag! A classic from the Louis Vuitton x Murakami series, reinterpreting the Monogram pattern with the artist Takashi Murakami's signature rainbow tones. The Monogram features a smartphone-specific pocket and can also hold keys, a passport, credit cards, and cash. Easily store personal essentials, the perfect travel companion. Size 19Cmx10cm.

items.name_en: M14162 Murakami! This Zippy wallet is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series, featuring playful Monogram flowers on Monogram coated canvas, interpreting the Japanese artist's 'Superflat' style. With an all-around zip closure, it features practical elements such as multiple card slots, a zip coin pocket, and a large ticket pocket. 21 x 12 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width).

items.name_cn:
M14163 ( - )
The small Victorine wallet is elevated with a vibrant multicolor Monogram pattern from the re-edition of the Louis Vuitton x Murakami series, refreshing the house's iconic signature with the Japanese artist's rainbow tones. Made of coated canvas with a refined calfskin lining and silver hardware. A zip pocket holds coins, while the interior has multiple compartments for bills and cards.
Size: 12 x 9.5 x 2.5cm

items.name_en: M14163 Black & Color! LV x TM Victorine Wallet This miniature Victorine Wallet from the Louis Vuitton x Murakami series is small and exquisite, with a colorful Monogram pattern reinterpreting Louis Vuitton's classic logo in the famous rainbow tones of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The wallet is made of coated canvas, featuring a refined calfskin lining and silver metal fittings, and is equipped with a zippered coin pocket, with multiple compartments inside for bills and business cards.

items.name_en: M14178 Black & Color! LV x TM Passport Cover This classic Louis Vuitton x Murakami series passport cover is crafted from coated canvas with a simple design, embellished with the Monogram pattern reinterpreted in the iconic rainbow tones of artist Takashi Murakami, showcasing a lively playful style and adding a sophisticated touch to the journey. The passport cover is lined with calfskin and features multiple business card slots and pockets, making it exceptionally practical.

items.name_en: M30317 Monogram (〽️Grade A Full Steel〽️) Personalized, chip changeable! Zippy Zipper Vertical Wallet. This Louis Vuitton Zippy vertical zipper wallet is crafted from Monogram Eclipse canvas, offering a stylish and practical design ideal for carrying credit cards and cash. It features a secure all-around zipper construction with multiple card slots, a zip coin pocket, and several bill and receipt compartments. 10 x 20 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)
